channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Box of rubbish left on the grass embankment, 20th March
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household waste dumped on street, 20th March
item.description:
This location is consistently used as a dump site for household waste including books, prams, wood, clothes and bags of litter.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Branch Place, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish over spilling on to pavement, 20th March
item.description:
This is page 2 of this report which happened this morning 20/03/2026 this dustman must must stop doing this every 2 week period ( week 2 ) of black bag collections it is the same dustman he must live in the croydon area as he walks down from the top of the road and collects all wheelie bins, bags etc from gardens and piles them up including dumping bags on the pavementas you see from pictures please get him to stop this, it is attracting vermine foxs, rats, mice and causing a mess on our pavements and road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Oak Grove Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped car, 20th March
item.description:
This car appeared 4 weeks ago and not moved since, no number plate on front and license plate is not recognised on gov website

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39, Okemore Gardens, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple bikes, junk, 20th March
item.description:
Months but gwtting worse
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tunnel Avenue, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish left in street, 20th March
item.description:
Been left here for months

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Norman Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Continuing issue fly tipping on Mackenzie Road, 20th March
item.description:
This has been continuing since August on corner of Mackenzie and Beckenham Road Will the council resolve this issue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mackenzie Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking pavements.., 20th March
item.description:
Again and again i keep complaining regarding about the dust man who keeps coming down my road this morning at 05.40am and gathering all wheelie bins and over loading black bags either on the pavement or bins ...........

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Oak Grove Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pathway is destroyed, 20th March
item.description:
The gravelling is coming away- this is extremely dangerous is there a primary school adjacent to it. Urgent !

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Victory Place, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement stone, 20th March
item.description:
N/a

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Broadfields Avenue, Southgate

item.title: Bikes causing obstruction in road - dangerous mess - and resdents parking bay please remove, 20th March

item.title: 2 large broken branches, 20th March
item.description:
2 large broken branches still attached to tree need pruning. Would be dangerous if they fell on pedestrian or in the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 98, Avenue Road, Penge, Greater London

item.title: Lifter everywhere, 20th March
item.description:
Litter strewn all over the path.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Place Farm Avenue, Poverest, Greater London

item.title: Household rubbish dumped, 20th March
item.description:
Rubbish piling up- packaging might have address on. Old paint tin re cycling bags

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mount Pleasant Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole, 20th March
item.description:
Dangerous and deep pot hole for vehicles entering into Hansol Road from Upton Road. Having to swerve towards the kerb or on coming cars at the give way line. Needs repairing asap!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hansol Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on the big slide, 20th March
item.description:
There’s graffiti on the big silver tube slide which needs removing please .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Main Road, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 10 feet long and growing, 20th March
item.description:
Large pot hole, has been here for a few months now.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 172, Brownhill Road, Catford South, Greater London

item.title: Flytip again been there for 6 weeks on grass oposite the pumping staition, 20th March
